stat_block.text: This surprisingly weighty, though well-balanced, wooden buckler is emblazoned with the image of a sapling. The sapling withers as the shield takes damage.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Transmutation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the transmutation school of magic, typically changing something’s form.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: The buckler expands, with the sapling image growing into a mighty oak tree. The buckler becomes a tower shield , gaining the corresponding AC bonus, Speed penalty, and ability to Take Cover . It keeps the same Hit Points and Broken Threshold, but its Hardness and Bulk increase by 2 in this form. The shield remains in this form until you Activate it again to revert it to a buckler.

variants.name: Sapling Shield (Minor)
variants.text: The buckler has Hardness 3, HP 24, and BT 12.

variants.name: Sapling Shield (Lesser)
variants.text: The buckler has Hardness 6, HP 48, and BT 24.

variants.name: Sapling Shield (Moderate)
variants.text: The buckler has Hardness 8, HP 64, and BT 32.

variants.name: Sapling Shield (Greater)
variants.text: The buckler has Hardness 11, HP 88, and BT 44.

variants.name: Sapling Shield (Major)
variants.text: The buckler has Hardness 13, HP 104, and BT 52.

variants.name: Sapling Shield (True)
variants.text: The buckler has Hardness 15, HP 120, and BT 60.
